articles.description: Most of the U.S. stock market rose after oil prices eased back to where they were before the war with Iran, but drops for AI stocks kept the market in check

articles.title: Market Turbulence: Tech Stocks Slip, Oil Prices Drop
articles.description: Global equity markets experienced a decline as investors sold off high-performing tech and chip stocks, with notable drops in crude oil prices. The S&P 500 and Nasdaq were set for weekly losses, while the Dow saw potential gains. A significant 7.7% drop in chip stocks marked the largest weekly decrease since March.

articles.title: Oil prices plummet on hopes of increased supply, high gasoline prices persist
articles.description: The pause in hostilities between the U.S. and Iran has led to a decline in future oil prices, but industry analysts say it will take time to trickle down to lower gasoline prices.

articles.title: Crude Oil Prices Fall Sharply as Global Supply Risks Ease

articles.title: Nat-Gas Prices Drop as July Nymex Contract Expires
articles.description: July Nymex natural gas (NGN26 ) on Friday closed down -0.112 (-3.35%). Nat-gas prices retreated from a 3-month high on Friday and settled sharply lower. Long liquidation pressured prices on Friday, the last day of trading for the expiring July Nymex...

articles.title: Most of Wall Street rises, but sinking AI stocks keep it on track for a losing week
articles.description: Most of the U.S. stock market is rising after oil prices eased back to where they were before the war with Iran, but drops for AI stocks are keeping the market in check. The S&P 500 slipped 0.2% Friday and is on track to close out just its second losing week in the last 13, largely because of drops for AI stocks. The Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 7 points, and the Nasdaq composite dropped 0.1%. Earlier in the day, stock indexes tumbled in South Korea and Japan on weakness for AI stocks. Treasury yields eased with the fall in oil prices.

articles.title: Oil slips as Strait of Hormuz shipping recovers
articles.description: Oil prices are easing as shipping through the Strait of Hormuz rebounds, though geopolitical risks continue to cloud the outlook.
